nodes.label: README.md
nodes.summary: Project documentation file providing overview and usage instructions for the Repo-Archi-Graph visualization tool.

nodes.label: scanner.py
nodes.summary: Core Python module responsible for scanning workspace files, analyzing code structure, and generating architectural metadata for visualization.

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.summary: Interactive web interface that renders the architecture graph using Vis.js library. Displays nodes, edges, and file metadata with IBM Bob AI branding.
